languages.text: Капитан отряда долго возится, пытаясь убедить {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g} дать доступ к записям. После нескольких безуспешных попыток экран несколько раз мигает, когитатор издает протяжный писк и затухает.

traits.locale_text: Капитан отряда долго возится, пытаясь убедить {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g} дать доступ к записям. После нескольких безуспешных попыток экран несколько раз мигает, когитатор издает протяжный писк и затухает.

languages.text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.
languages.original_text: Капитан отряда долго возится, пытаясь убедить {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g} дать доступ к записям. После нескольких безуспешных попыток экран несколько раз мигает, когитатор издает протяжный писк и затухает.

traits.locale_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

languages.text: 小队队长折腾了很久，试图说服{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}开放日志权限。几次尝试未果后，屏幕闪了几下，沉思者发出一声长鸣，随即彻底暗了下去。
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: 小队队长折腾了很久，试图说服{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}开放日志权限。几次尝试未果后，屏幕闪了几下，沉思者发出一声长鸣，随即彻底暗了下去。

languages.text: El capitán del equipo se esfuerza durante un largo rato, tratando de convencer a los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} para que le concedan acceso a los registros. Después de varios intentos fallidos, la pantalla parpadea varias veces y el cogitador emite un largo pitido antes de quedarse en negro.
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: El capitán del equipo se esfuerza durante un largo rato, tratando de convencer a los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} para que le concedan acceso a los registros. Después de varios intentos fallidos, la pantalla parpadea varias veces y el cogitador emite un largo pitido antes de quedarse en negro.

languages.text: Le capitaine d'escouade s'active un long moment, tâchant de convaincre les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} de lui donner accès aux journaux de bord. Après une série de tentatives infructueuses, l'écran clignote plusieurs fois, puis le cogitateur émet un long sifflement avant de s'éteindre.
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: Le capitaine d'escouade s'active un long moment, tâchant de convaincre les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} de lui donner accès aux journaux de bord. Après une série de tentatives infructueuses, l'écran clignote plusieurs fois, puis le cogitateur émet un long sifflement avant de s'éteindre.

languages.text: Yüzbaşı, {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhlarını{/g} kayıtlara erişim izni vermeye ikna etmeye epey bir uğraşıyor. Birkaç başarısız girişimin ardından ekran birkaç kez yanıp sönüyor, kavramsayar uzun bir bip sesi çıkarıyor ve kararıyor.
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: Yüzbaşı, {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhlarını{/g} kayıtlara erişim izni vermeye ikna etmeye epey bir uğraşıyor. Birkaç başarısız girişimin ardından ekran birkaç kez yanıp sönüyor, kavramsayar uzun bir bip sesi çıkarıyor ve kararıyor.

languages.text: Der Captain des Trupps versucht die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} zu überzeugen, ihm Zugriff auf die Protokolle zu gewähren. Nach mehreren erfolglosen Versuchen blinkt der Bildschirm einige Male und der Cogitator schaltet sich mit einem langgezogenen Pfeifton ab.
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: Der Captain des Trupps versucht die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} zu überzeugen, ihm Zugriff auf die Protokolle zu gewähren. Nach mehreren erfolglosen Versuchen blinkt der Bildschirm einige Male und der Cogitator schaltet sich mit einem langgezogenen Pfeifton ab.

languages.text: 長時間の修理作業を経て、{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械霊{/g}にログへのアクセスを許可してもらうよう説得を試みる。しかし、何度か試みても成功せず、画面が数回点滅し、コギターが長いブープ音を鳴らして暗闇に包まれた。
languages.original_text: The squad captain tinkers for a long time, trying to convince the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} to grant access to the logs. After several unsuccessful attempts, the screen blinks several times, and the cogitator emits a long beep and goes dark.

traits.locale_text: 長時間の修理作業を経て、{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械霊{/g}にログへのアクセスを許可してもらうよう説得を試みる。しかし、何度か試みても成功せず、画面が数回点滅し、コギターが長いブープ音を鳴らして暗闇に包まれた。
